title: Schwartzkopffia lastii
taxonomy: Schwartzkopffia lastii is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Schwartzkopffia and is a succulent plant native to South Africa. Schwartzkopffia lastii is considered an endangered species due to its limited geographic range and habitat degradation. The plant's classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Gentianales, Family: Apocynaceae, Genus: Schwartzkopffia, Species: S. lastii. Further research may provide more detailed information about its classification and taxonomic relationships.
